---
name: "Lesson or Topic Request"
about: Suggest a new lesson, topic, or project
title: "[Lesson Request] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Level

- [ ] Beginner
- [ ] Intermediate
- [ ] Advanced
- [ ] Project
- [ ] Exercises

## Proposed title

Example: "Beginner – Control Flow Basics" or "Advanced – Async I/O with asyncio"

## What should this cover?

- List the key concepts or skills the lesson should teach.
- Include any example problems, datasets, or scenarios.

## Why is this useful?

- Explain how this would help learners using the repository.
